title: Disposition of fees
doc_html:
§547. Disposition of fees

           The fees paid by the homesteader, except as may be otherwise provided in this Subpart shall be remitted by the Register of the State Land Office to the State Treasurer.
doc_text:
§547.  Disposition of fees
The fees paid by the homesteader, except as may be otherwise provided
in this Subpart shall be remitted by the Register of the State Land Office to the
State Treasurer.
